title: Rainfall Shower Head Fixed Showerhead 8.8-Inch Round Bathroom Rainhead Overhead Waterfall Shower Head with Adjustable Swivel Ball Joint | G1/2" Universal Fitting | ABS Chrome
features: 【Ideal for Shower】Large overhead shower head provide a steady, full-coverage spray, perfect for every shower need, from rinsing shampoo from hair to relaxing tired muscles. Guaranteed this rainwater showerhead is a great choice for replacement.

【Self-cleaning Silicone Jet Nozzles】The waterfall shower head has 184 self-cleaning nozzles, just press the silicone nozzle to easily wipe away calcium and lime build-up, very easy to maintain, no worries about clogging and rusting.

【G1/2" Universal Fitting】The rain shower head with adjustable swivel ball joint can fit onto any standard shower arm, allow you to adjust angle to accommodate both kids and adults, providing perfect shower experience for every family member.

【Durable Material】The 8.8-Inch round fixed shower head is made of engineered ABS plastic, won't burst due to thermal expansion and contraction, non-toxic, lead-free and rust-free. Back cover of the rainhead features a chrome plated tech, mirror-like look.

【Easy no-tool installation】Rainfall shower head can mount on any standard shower arm in several minutes, no plumber needed, simply unscrew the old one and screw on the new. Please feel free to contact us whenever you meet any problems, your satisfaction is our priority.
description: Specification: Type: fixed shower heads Shape: Round Diameter (approx.): 22.5cm / 8.8 inch Material: ABS plastic Color: Silver+Black Size of the connector: standard G 1/2 Box Contains: 1x Rainfall Showerhead
